header.interests: My main interests are Node, TypeScript, Scrapping, Realtime Apps and Online Marketing.

projects.title: Hairly
projects.description: Geolocated market for hairdressers and hairdressers. Users can make an appointment from the application and hairdressers can manage their appointments without wasting time picking up the phone.

projects.title: Hookapp
projects.description: Application to locate nearby pubs that offer hookahs in their letters. In addition to being able to see characteristics of the premises such as: the range of tobacco that the premises currently has, if it has air conditioning, billiard, etc.

projects.title: BuscoUnTech
projects.description: Application to publish and find offers related to the tech market.

projects.title: Management tool
projects.description: Own tool to work with a supplier.It allows us to synchronize a type of product that we sell automatically saving hours in the analysis and introduction of this to the database.

projects.title: Component Comparison App
projects.description: Algoritmo para comparar productos entre PcComponentes y PcBox. The idea was to make a web application to generate budgets for different pages by adding an affiliate link to monetize it.

projects.title: BOT Telegram bets
projects.description: Bot to manage CS:GO bets in telegram friends group
